channel.title: Developer-Tools on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Developer-Tools on Arrans github.io

item.title: OpenHands/OpenHands
item.description: 🙌 OpenHands: AI-Driven Development

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: iib0011/omni-tools
item.description: Self-hosted collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks. No ads, no tracking, just fast, accessible utilities right from your browser!

item.title: jarun/nnn
item.description: n³ The unorthodox terminal file manager

item.title: TabbyML/tabby
item.description: Self-hosted AI coding assistant

item.title: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI
item.description: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

item.title: wavetermdev/waveterm
item.description: An open-source, AI-integrated, cross-platform terminal for seamless workflows

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: 💾 The shell-like, command line terminal file manager

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Source-controlled AI checks, enforceable in CI. Powered by the open-source Continue CLI

item.title: lapce/lapce
item.description: Lightning-fast and Powerful Code Editor written in Rust

item.title: terrastruct/d2
item.description: D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

item.title: usebruno/bruno
item.description: Opensource IDE For Exploring and Testing API’s (lightweight alternative to Postman/Insomnia)

item.title: SWE-agent/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using your LM of choice. It can also be employed for offensive cybersecurity or competitive coding challenges. [NeurIPS 2024]

item.title: koalaman/shellcheck
item.description: ShellCheck, a static analysis tool for shell scripts

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: flawiddsouza/Restfox
item.description: Offline-First Minimalistic HTTP & Socket Testing Client for the Web & Desktop

item.title: foss42/apidash
item.description: API Dash is a beautiful AI-powered open-source cross-platform (Desktop & Mobile) API Client built using Flutter which can help you easily create & customize your HTTP & GraphQL API requests, visually inspect responses and generate API integration code. A lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia.

item.title: go-dev-frame/sponge
item.description: A powerful and easy-to-use Go development framework that enables you to effortlessly build stable, reliable, and high-performance backend services with a “low-code” approach.

item.title: MbBrainz/ttslab
item.description: TTSLab is THE place to easily test ANY text to text to speech model on your own pc with 0 cost

item.title: BandarLabs/gitpodcast
item.description: Convert any git repository into an engaging podcast
